exploration_notes: Identified three main mechanism categories: (1) ConvergenceWarning is defined in sklearn/exceptions.py and raised via warnings.warn() in ~25 non-test estimator files across linear_model, cluster, decomposition, mixture, neural_network, etc. (2) check_is_fitted is defined in sklearn/utils/validation.py and used across 50+ estimator files to guard predict/transform methods against unfitted estimators, raising NotFittedError (also in exceptions.py).
